
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the current visual perception, I can see some circular objects on the shelf. I need to get closer to verify which one specifically has a blue color. I'll walk closer to get a better view of the objects.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 1.0,
  "z": -1.0
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762366245436, 'end': 1762366256407, 'elapsed': 10971}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 785.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 116155776, 't1': 116156561, 'elapsed': 785}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6422, completion=144, total=6566
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=\-0.65, y=0.08, z=\-1\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now I'll look directly at the objects on the shelf to better identify the blue circular object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.0,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -1.0
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762366257195, 'end': 1762366263632, 'elapsed': 6437}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1413.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 116163000, 't1': 116164413, 'elapsed': 1413}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6591, completion=119, total=6710
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the updated visual perception, I can now clearly see a blue circular object which appears to be labeled as "Tape\_4". This matches the description of being both blue and circular. I will now proceed to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Tape_4"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762366265049, 'end': 1762366276379, 'elapsed': 11330}`

- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 116175749, 't1': 116176576, 'elapsed': 827}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8324, completion=113, total=8437
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object Tape\_4

</details>

I have successfully picked up the blue circular tape roll that you requested.
